value: Postdoctoral Research Fellow, School of Civil and Environmental Engineering, Nanyang Technological University

I am a postdoctoral research fellow at Nanyang Technological University. My research focuses on artificial intelligence in maritime human-machine interaction, shipping and maritime systems, collective intelligence collaboration, and system resilience modelling.

My research investigates maritime AI socialisation, autonomous-driving trust and anthropomorphic design, Bayesian-network and system-dynamics modelling of ship and port systems, green shipping policy, and VR-enabled marine conservation.

My future work focuses on human-swarm teaming in high-risk maritime environments, cognitive load management, interface transparency, and multi-agent collaboration mechanisms for intelligent maritime systems.
Selected publications spanning maritime AI, transport resilience, green shipping policy, autonomous-vehicle trust, and human-machine interaction.
Selected academic honors, scholarships, and recognitions.
